description_long: This is a three-seater sofa with a classic design, featuring a beige fabric upholstery accented by dark wood trim along the base, arms, and backrest. The seat consists of three individual, uniform cushions, while the backrest is adorned with three loose cushions—two large, patterned throw pillows on the sides and a smaller, striped cushion in the center. The armrests are rolled and padded, with decorative wood detailing that matches the base. The sofa stands on four short, rounded legs, which are only partially visible. The upholstery appears subtly striped, and the overall silhouette is gently curved, giving it a traditional yet inviting appearance. The combination of neutral tones and dark accents makes it suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A beige, three-seater sofa with dark wood trim, rolled arms, and patterned throw pillows, featuring a classic, inviting design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, three back cushions (two patterned, one striped), and rolled armrests with wood trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rolled armrest, thick seat and back cushions, and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, gently curved backrest with dark wood trim and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, emphasizing the sofa's profile and structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three loose back cushions, with two large patterned throw pillows on the sides and one smaller striped cushion in the center; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, padded armrests at both ends, slightly higher than the seat, featuring dark wood trim and decorative scrollwork.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded legs positioned at the corners, partially visible, likely made of dark wood and slightly recessed under the base.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, gently curved continuous backrest with three loose back cushions and no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtly striped beige fabric on the main body, with patterned throw pillows featuring geometric and floral motifs; overall texture appears smooth with minimal decorative stitching.
